polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary: Mixed: Sentiment is bullish for Bitcoin, with a 67% probability ($128,651 volume) of reaching $67,500 in July. Conversely, Ethereum shows significant uncertainty; while not the majority, a substantial 41% of traders ($187,053 volume) are betting on a dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026. This suggests short-term optimism for BTC contrasted with long-term volatility concerns for ETH.
